headline: Aehr Test Systems: Strong Prospects But Fully Valued - Hold
summary: Aehr Test Systems Q results miss but backlog hits records; FY2027 growth ahead. Margins/dilution risks keep stock fully valued.

headline: onsemi, Seagate, Impinj, and Amtech Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session as semiconductor stocks rallied in response to the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
